name: Gingham Beach Towel - Room Essentials™
description:
Get ready for summertime fun in charming style with this Gingham Beach Towel from Room Essentials™. This beach towel showcases a classic gingham pattern in red and blue hues for a bright and eye-catching look. Made of 100% cotton terry fabric, this beach towel is perfect for sunbathing on the beach or drying off after a swim.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
